新加坡加码人工智能布局，英伟达将落地本地研发中心

chinese_news.title: 第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京顺利举办！近20位行业大咖解码Agent与非共识机遇
chinese_news.summary:
今日，由量子位主办的第四届中国AIGC产业峰会在京启幕。

2026年，AI产业一路高歌猛进。从“龙虾”到“Harness”，爆款Agent接连出圈、风靡全网。面对层出不穷的新业态与新玩法，不少从业者和普通用户都感到困惑：如何找准AI的使用方式？怎样把握产业机遇？又该如何跟上行业发展的步伐？

正是在这一背景下，本届大会以「@所有人，马上AI起来」为主题，集结近20位行业重磅嘉宾，联动产业头部企业、新锐创业公司、顶尖学术力量，围绕AI Agent商业化落地、多模态技术突破、千行百业场景深耕、算力基础设施变革等核心议题，开启了一场深度交流与思想碰撞。

chinese_news.title: 长鑫科技更新招股书，碧桂园错失300亿
chinese_news.summary:
地产行业内，曾有望跑出两家明星创投企业，一家是世纪金源，另一家是碧桂园。前者现在做得顺风顺水，收获一个又一个IPO，而碧桂园因为地产业务暴雷，需要大量资金保交楼，被迫中断了在科技领域的投资“大爆发”。

01

5月17日，计划登陆科创板的长鑫科技集团股份有限公司（以下简称：长鑫科技）更新了招股书。新招股书的财务数据显示，2026年第一季度，长鑫科技营收508亿元，同比增长719.13%；归母净利润247.62亿元，同比大增1688%，完成创历史的盈亏翻盘（2025年累计亏损366.5亿元）。

可以预计，随着营收和利润的大幅增长，长鑫科技的估值将会再创新高。上市前，长鑫科技的估值已逼近3000亿元。但若按2026年一季度的财务表现，结合同类已上市企业的市盈率计算，部分机构给到长鑫科技的最新估值高达2万亿左右。

长鑫科技是中国大陆规模最大的DRAM研发设计制造一体化（IDM）企业。DRAM芯片是电脑、手机、服务器内存条的核心部件。今年，存储产业

chinese_news.title: 理想新L9上市72小时：老车主复购占大头，仍需从“家庭”破圈
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 徐蔡钰 编辑 | 李勤

“爆了，试驾根本约不上”，5月16至17日，理想新L9上市的首个周末，门店挤满了前来试驾的用户们。

这款在2022年首次面世的增程大六座SUV，发布了第四代车型。新L9分Ultra与Livis两种版本，起售价分别为45.98万元、50.98万元。

相较此前的年度改款，本次新L9的更新幅度更加显著：

全系标配72.7kWh电池，纯电续航达到420公里，综合续航突破1600公里。理想自研马赫芯片首次上车，单颗芯片算力达到1280TOPS。线控转向系统与后轮转向技术的加入，带来了底盘能力的大幅升级；Livis版本额外搭载的800V主动悬架与EMB电子机械制动系统，更是汽车底盘前沿技术的首发落地。

配置拉满的同时，将实际售价较预售价大幅下调5万元，新L9一套“高配降价”的组合拳，力度超出了市场预期。

新车上市后，理想全国门店似乎复现了2022年第一代L9上市的火爆盛况

chinese_news.title: 做出百万台割草机器人后，未岚大陆CEO决定让自己变得“不重要”｜硬氪专访
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

未岚大陆CEO任冠佼等了7年，等到了行业的爆发。

他还记得，2019年刚进入无边界智能割草机器人赛道，自己“只是觉得这个方向一定能火”。到2021年第一代产品推出时，他们也只敢确定，这是一个能做到10-20亿的行业。

直到2025年，增速超出他的预期。IDC数据显示，2025年全球无边界割草机器人出货量达到131.8万台，同比增长182.4%，占整个割草机器人市场出货量的66.2%。未岚大陆自身的累计实现量产，在今年突破100万台，公司营收迈入数十亿量级。

但同时，高速增长的背后，也倒逼任冠佼完成了一场至关重要的认知破局。

任冠佼意识到，行业迭代速度持续加快，以往相对保守的经营方式显然已经跟不上节奏。

他逼着自己从一个工程师成长为公司掌舵人。最近一年，任冠佼跳出琐碎的一线工作、学习战略研判，并慢慢适应创业者最难的一课——学会放手。

他不再事事亲力

chinese_news.title: 要做数字劳动力生产工厂，「未来式智能」完成Pre-A轮融资
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜邓咏仪

36氪获悉，未来式智能（AutoAgents.ai）近日完成Pre-A轮融资，新进投资方包括凡创资本、中关村资本、探元资本，老股东东证创新、麟阁创投跟投，本轮融资主要用于算力投入、团队扩张以及新产品的生态建设运营。

未来式智能成立于2023年6月，专注于以智能体技术赋能知识工作者。核心团队来自达摩院、腾讯、字节跳动和谷歌。创始人兼CEO杨劲松曾在达摩院担任产品/商业化总监，曾任字节飞书AI负责人、亚马逊AWS aPaaS平台负责人，主导推出阿里灵杰、通义-Alicemind，在AI产品和商业化方面有着多年经验。

作为核心产品之一的企业级智能体搭建平台“灵搭”，旨在解决企业部署和应用大模型时的核心诉求：数据安全隐私、权限分级管理、复杂系统集成，以及智能体在真实业务场景中的交付稳定性。

“灵搭”从诞生之初便一直把重点放在企业客户，尤其是电力、金融、制造等对稳定性和合规要求极高的行业。

chinese_news.title: 早期项目 | Chance AI获美图等数百万美元投资，用户数已达20万
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，Visual Agent（视觉智能体）创业公司Chance AI宣布完成数百万美元天使轮融资。本轮由美图领投，NYX Ventures、阿里系投资机构等跟投。融资将用于模型能力迭代、北美学生群体增长、以及社区与商业化探索。

Chance AI成立于2025年，核心产品是全球第一款以摄像头为主要交互入口的AI产品——Visual Agent（视觉智能体）。

与传统AI产品依赖输入框不同，用户打开Chance AI后直接拍摄眼前内容，系统即可理解视觉意图并提供判断、建议和行动方案。

chinese_news.title: 8点1氪丨谷歌推出Gemini 3.5系列模型；DeepSeek回应用户“对话泄露”疑虑；全国存款十强城市出炉
chinese_news.summary:
今日热点导览

  • 谷歌推出Gemini 3.5系列模型
  • 洁丽雅回应豪门内斗传闻，“毛巾少爷”1个月带货超500万元
  • 巨力索具连续第二日跌停
  • 前三星芯片负责人：明年内存将降价
  • 自费流感疫苗也可使用医保报销
  • 谷歌搜索宣布大改版，AI模式与代理助手全面嵌入

TOP 3 大新闻

DeepSeek回应用户“对话泄露”疑虑

5月19日，DeepSeek发布关于< think >字符触发模型异常回复的说明。近期关注到有用户反馈，在与DeepSeek模型的对话中输入< think >这类特殊字符后，模型偶发返回不可预期的内容，使部分用户产生了“对话泄露”的疑虑。针对这一问题，技术团队经全面排查后发现：输入< think >等字符触发返回异常内容，属于特殊字符引发的模型幻觉，不涉及安全问题或隐私泄露。

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will OpenAI file confidentially for IPO before end of Q2 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $80,000 by June 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed maintain current interest rates (no cuts) through August 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Oil prices sliding on Iran peace talks suggest disinflation narrative gaining traction; Powell's messaging will be critical June–July 2026.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: 'U.S. crude oil falls below $100 per barrel after Trump says Iran talks in final stages'

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA establish a research center in Singapore before year-end 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: 36Kr reports NVIDIA planning Singapore R&D hub as part of regional AI expansion; concrete infrastructure play with near-term visibility.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will DRAM and NAND memory chip prices increase by ≥15% before December 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: 36Kr reports Samsung labor talks broke down; ADATA chairman warns DRAM/NAND entering next price surge cycle—supply shock signal understated in crypto/macro circles.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr: '三星劳资谈判破裂，威刚董事长称DRAM、NAND恐再掀涨价潮' (Samsung labor failure, ADATA chair warns memory price surge imminent)

market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report (official U.S. government data)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump's Iran negotiations dominating headlines; if deal closes, supply overhang will be massive but market still pricing tail risk. Clean dollar/commodity play.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Trump says Iran talks 'final stages'; oil already fallen below $100 on rumors alone

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Stellantis (STLA) stock outperform Nasdaq-100 by >5% through November 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg (adjusted closing prices)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Ram 'muscle truck' launch despite high gas prices signals confidence in EVT/ICE transition; tariff rollback momentum (e.l.f. Beauty walking back increases) reduces margin pressure.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: 'Ram unveils lineup of Hemi V-8 engine-powered muscle trucks'; tariff relief trend emerging

market_questions_to_create.question: Will total crypto market cap (BTC + ETH + top 20 alts) exceed $2.8T by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap or CoinGecko (end-of-day aggregate market cap snapshot)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Prediction market surge generating regulatory heat (Senate Commerce hearing), but Fairshake PAC's $20M backing winning state primaries; policy tailwind underpriced in long-dated bets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'Fairshake PAC's $20M backing pays off in three US state primaries'; Fed master account proposal moving; Senate scrutiny ≠ adverse outcome

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SEC's top crypto regulator ('Crypto Mom') departure accelerate approval of spot Ethereum ETF expansion by March 31, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC official press releases / Federal Register (approval or denial of new crypto ETF applications)

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: 'SEC's Crypto Mom to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator'

investment_theses.thesis: Long crude oil (WTI) via USO or oil majors (XLE) on Iran deal risk premium; short wins if deal closes, collapsing energy inflation narrative.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump says Iran talks 'final stages'
Oil already slid below $100 on rumor alone; deal completion = $75–80 target
Tariff rollback trend (e.l.f. Beauty, consumer relief) signals soft-landing re-pricing
investment_theses.counter_view: Escalation risk (Israel-Iran tensions, Ukraine) could reverse deal momentum and spike oil. Mid-East incidents always tail risks.
investment_theses.expression: Short USO (crude ETF) or long DBC (commodities) to hedge; alternatively, long XLE call spread (June–July 2026 expiry)

investment_theses.thesis: Long semiconductor DRAM/NAND exposure (MU, SSNLF, SK Hynix calls) on Samsung labor failure catalyzing supply shock and price recovery by Q4 2026.
supporting_signals: 36Kr (China-first source): Samsung labor breakdown + ADATA CEO warning of DRAM/NAND surge imminent
Supply-side shock (not demand) — more defensible thesis than macro AI chip boom
Intuit, Oracle layoffs signal eventual PC/cloud refresh cycle demand recovery
investment_theses.counter_view: AI hyperscaling (NVIDIA, data centers) already front-running memory demand; commodity memory prices may stay depressed if cloud oversupply persists.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU June 2027 calls (strike: $110–120 range) or buy Micron stock outright; MU is most liquid memory play

investment_theses.thesis: Short Intuit (INTU) oversold; layoffs signal management pivot away from AI-disruption narrative; rebound to SPY outperformance likely within 6 months.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Intuit hammered on AI fears; 17% cut is aggressive de-risking
Market had priced 'AI kills tax software' thesis; reality is tax code complexity is moat
Comparable: Accenture, Consulting cut news → short-term pain, recovery within 2Q
investment_theses.counter_view: Structural decline in tax prep market (IRS free filing, government competition) is real; workforce cut doesn't solve TAM compression.
investment_theses.expression: Long INTU stock or INTU June 2026 $150 calls (if stock ~$135); avoid puts—volatility skew expensive

investment_theses.thesis: Long Bitcoin (via spot BTC or perpetual futures) on Fairshake PAC's political wins + Fed master account approval signaling regulatory tailwind; ETF outflows are capitulation.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: Fairshake $20M funding winning three state primaries
CoinDesk: Fed proposing limited master accounts for crypto firms (long-awaited infrastructure win)
BTC $2B+ spot ETF outflows with price resilience at $77K = weak-hand exit, strong-hand accumulation
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory approval is slow; prediction market scrutiny (Senate hearing) could stall momentum. Macro tightening or trade war escalation reverses momentum.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perpetual futures (Binance/FTX 5–10x leverage, tight stops) or spot BTC if long-horizon; risk/reward best in June 2026

investment_theses.thesis: Long Ethereum (relative to Bitcoin) on Ethereum Foundation departures signaling inflection point toward pragmatic governance; ETH/BTC ratio breakout above 0.055 likely by August 2026.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Ethereum Foundation high-profile departures spark governance debate (opportunity to reset incentives)
Agent AI boom (36Kr: Qwen 3.7-Max, OpenAI agents) drives Layer 2 / smart contract activity
ETH has lagged BTC on regulatory uncertainty; leadership change often catalyzes rebound
investment_theses.counter_view: Foundation departures could signal infighting, not renewal; Ethereum's scaling challenges unresolved; BTC ETF inflows have structural advantage.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC pair trade (long ETH spot, short BTC perpetuals, or long ETH calls + short BTC puts); delta-neutral volatility play
